{{Quote|Been injured in combat recently? Lose a foot or a hand? Send for our electronic brochure of high-quality mechanical limbs. If our Mechanical Hands are good enough for Luke Skywalker, aren't they good enough for you?|Jibb Swaine's e-mail advertisement|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Jibb Swaine''' was an employee of [[Pruett Products]], a company that sold mechanical replacement limbs. Swaine once sent out an advertisement claiming that [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] mechanical hand was made by Pruett.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
